title: कामाख्या स्तोत्रम्
devanagariText:
॥ श्री कामाख्या स्तोत्रम् ॥

कामाख्ये काम सम्पन्ने कामेश्वरि हरप्रिये।
कामनां देहि मे नित्यं कामेश्वरि नमोऽस्तु ते॥१॥

कामाख्ये वरदे देवि नीलपर्वतवासिनि।
त्वां देवि नवसन्ध्यायां रामं वन्दे सुरेश्वरि॥२॥

कामरूपे महामाये सर्वकामप्रदायिनि।
सर्वसिद्धिकरे देवि कामाख्ये परमेश्वरि॥३॥

नीलाचलनिवासिन्यै सर्वलोकसुखप्रदे।
शक्तिपीठमहास्थाने कामाख्ये ते नमो नमः॥४॥

दशमहाविद्यारूपे कामकलाविलासिनि।
योगिनीगणसेविते कामाख्ये ते नमो नमः॥५॥

सिद्धिदात्रि महादेवि कामाख्ये कामरूपिणि।
मातंगि छिन्नमस्तेऽथ कमले कालि पार्वति॥६॥

त्वमेव विश्वजननी त्वमेव विश्वपालिनी।
त्वमेव सर्वलोकानां संहर्त्री परमेश्वरी॥७॥

कामाख्यास्तोत्रमिदं पुण्यं यः पठेत् प्रयतः शुचिः।
सर्वकामानवाप्नोति कामाख्याप्रसादतः॥८॥

॥ इति श्री कामाख्या स्तोत्रं सम्पूर्णम् ॥
transliteration:
|| Shri Kamakhya Stotram ||

Kamakhye Kama Sampanne Kameshvari Hara-priye.
Kamanam Dehi Me Nityam Kameshvari Namostu Te.||1||

Kamakhye Varade Devi Nila-parvata-vasini.
Tvam Devi Nava-sandhyayam Ramam Vande Sureshvari.||2||

Kama-rupe Maha-maye Sarva-kama-pradayini.
Sarva-siddhi-kare Devi Kamakhye Parameshvari.||3||

Nilachala-nivasinyai Sarva-loka-sukha-prade.
Shakti-pitha-maha-sthane Kamakhye Te Namo Namah.||4||

Dasha-mahavidya-rupe Kama-kala-vilasini.
Yogini-gana-sevite Kamakhye Te Namo Namah.||5||

Siddhi-datri Maha-devi Kamakhye Kama-rupini.
Matangi Chhinnamaste-atha Kamale Kali Parvati.||6||

Tvam Eva Vishva-janani Tvam Eva Vishva-palini.
Tvam Eva Sarva-lokanam Samhartri Parameshvari.||7||

Kamakhya-stotram-idam Punyam Yah Pathet Prayatah Shuchih.
Sarva-kaman-avapnoti Kamakhya-prasadatah.||8||

|| Iti Shri Kamakhya Stotram Sampurnam ||
hindiMeaning: हे कामाख्ये! कामसम्पन्ने! कामेश्वरि! हरप्रिये! मुझे नित्य कामना पूर्ण करो। नीलपर्वतनिवासिनी वरदा देवी! कामरूपे! महामाये! सर्वकामप्रदायिनी! शक्तिपीठ के महास्थान में विराजमान कामाख्ये! दशमहाविद्या रूप वाली! योगिनीगण सेविता! तू ही विश्वजननी, विश्वपालिनी और सर्वलोक की संहर्त्री परमेश्वरी है। यह पवित्र स्तोत्र पढ़ने वाला कामाख्या की कृपा से सर्वकामना पूर्ण करता है।
benefits: Hymn to Goddess Kamakhya of the sacred Nilachal Hill in Assam
Fulfills all desires through the grace of Kamakhya Devi
Invokes the power of all ten Mahavidyas
Sacred for Shakti Peetha pilgrimage and Tantric worship
Powerful for Ambubachi and Navratri recitation
description: Kamakhya Stotram — कामाख्या स्तोत्रम् — is a devotional hymn of praise offered to Goddess Durga. Attributed to Kalika Purana, this prayer holds a special place in Hindu devotional literature. Devotees recite this prayer to hymn to Goddess Kamakhya of the sacred Nilachal Hill in Assam and grant siddhi and spiritual accomplishment. It is also said to invoke the power of all ten Mahavidyas. It is especially recommended on Tuesday (Mangalvar), Friday (Shukravar), and Saturday (Shanivar) and during Navratri and Ambubachi for maximum spiritual benefit. At 8 verses long, the recitation takes roughly 5 minutes, making it accessible for regular devotional use. On this page, you can read the complete Kamakhya Stotram in Devanagari Sanskrit with English transliteration, Hindi meaning (arth), and free PDF download for offline recitation.
seoDescription: Read Kamakhya Stotram in Sanskrit with Hindi meaning. Sacred hymn to Goddess Kamakhya of Nilachal for desire fulfillment and Shakti Peetha grace.
